description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake on multiple platforms that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix build job that runs on different operating systems (currently only Windows) with various compiler toolchains (GCC, Clang, MSVC) in Release mode. For each matrix combination, check out the repository and submodules, configure CMake with the chosen compilers and build type, build the project, and execute tests.
